data.title: Skyworks Solutions Analysts Slash Their Forecasts Following Q1 Results
Earnings Summary: A P Moller Maersk Q4
DeBeers Slashes Production Guidance As Anglo American Considers Another Goodwill Impairment
data.description: De Beers slashes production by 31%, faces challenges in diamond marketDe Beers reduces diamond production by 31% due to weak market demand and faces challenges, including from lab-grown diamonds. China demand also down.

data.title: Volkswagen Unveils Plan For Entry-Level, $20K ID Electric Car: Details
data.description: Volkswagen is accelerating its focus on affordable electric vehicles. The company revealed a bold strategy to expand access to e-mobility, with a new entry-level model priced around €20,000.

data.title: Bob Iger Thinks Disney Has An Advantage In Streaming Over Netflix, Amazon: Here's Why
data.description: Disney CEO Bob Iger believes ESPN's 24/7 sports coverage gives the company a major competitive edge over streaming rivals like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video, as Disney prepares to expand ESPN across multiple platforms, including a new flagship streaming service.
